title: World Border Fade
description: Makes the world border fade depending on your distance to it.
body:
This mod works based on the warning distance to the world border, set by server's admins.

If you have admin access, you can configure the fading distance using `/worldborder warning distance [distance in blocks]`. 

![Fade GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4K3RkBF7/images/2b3d239e8e438d4367eb98a1300b207f998abe1b.webp)
